name: marble
title: Marble
description: Manage your Marble content including posts, authors, categories, and tags
author: dominikdev

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Marble API key from the workspace dashboard

commands.name: view-posts
commands.title: View Posts
commands.subtitle: Marble
commands.description: List and manage your Marble posts

commands.title: Create Post
commands.subtitle: Marble
commands.description: Create a new post in Marble

commands.name: view-authors

commands.subtitle: Marble
commands.description: List and manage your Marble authors

commands.description: List and manage your Marble categories

commands.description: List and manage your Marble tags

commands.name: create-tag

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
